    • createBoolean

      public static CyclingButtonWidgetBuilderImpl<Boolean> createBoolean(PropertyBuildContext propertyBuildContext, BooleanPropertyBuilderImpl propertyBuilder)

    • values

      public CyclingButtonWidgetBuilderImpl<T> values(Collection<T> values)
      Description copied from interface: CyclingButtonWidgetBuilder
      Sets the values for the cycling button. This defaults to all available values of the property, but can be changed to include only a subset of all allowed values. However, all values provided here must be valid values for the property.
      Specified by:
      values in interface CyclingButtonWidgetBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      values - The values to set for the cycling button
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining

    • valueToText

      public CyclingButtonWidgetBuilderImpl<T> valueToText(Function<T, net.minecraft.network.chat.Component> valueToText)
      Description copied from interface: CyclingButtonWidgetBuilder
      Sets the function for converting the current value of the cycling button widget to the text to display on the button.
      Specified by:
      valueToText in interface CyclingButtonWidgetBuilder<T>
      Parameters:
      valueToText - The text function
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining

      protected void preBuild(PropertyHolder<T> property)
      Description copied from class: WidgetBuilderImpl
      This is run before calling WidgetBuilderImpl.buildImpl(PropertyHolder). Can be used to fill in missing default values.
